data.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: document brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles config key
data.description:
## Description
Update plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md to document the new brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles configuration key added by story 3c31-8050.

**Entry to add** in the brainstorm configuration section (near brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles):

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
| brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles | integer | 2 | Maximum number of cross-epic interaction re-scans allowed after practitioner resolves an ambiguity or conflict. Following brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles pattern. When absent, defaults to 2. |

**Description context to add:**
After each resolution of an AMBIGUITY or CONFLICT cross-epic signal, brainstorm re-runs the cross-epic scan to check for remaining interactions. This key bounds how many re-scans can occur before brainstorm presents any remaining unresolved signals to the practitioner and asks whether to proceed.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (MODIFY)
